description.message: Automatically skip and fast-forward ads on Hotstar, Prime Video, and YouTube.

promo_open_video.message: Open a YouTube video to see detected promos

promo_no_detected.message: No promos detected in this video

promo_error.message: Could not analyze captions for this video

desc_prime.message: Automatically skip and fast-forward ads on Amazon Prime Video.

desc_hotstar.message: Hotstar ad skipping is always enabled on supported pages.

desc_youtube.message: Skip platform ads and fast-forward sponsored segments detected from captions.
